# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong admin api exposed.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

admin_api: &defaultAdminApiSettings
  enabled: true
  service: '*' # All services are accessible by default, you can specify a specific one here if needed (e.g., my-service)
  
proxy_listen: "0.0.0.0:80" # Change this to your client traffic port and IP address or leave it as is for Kong Gateway's internal accessibility 
admin_api_services: '*'    # All services are accessible by default, you can specify a specific one here if needed (e.g., my-service)  
database: &defaultDatabaseSettings
  hostname: "localhost"     # Change this to your database server IP or leave it as is for Kong Gateway local accessibility
  port: '5432'              # Default PostgreSQL Port, you can change if needed (e.g., use another one)  
admin_api_accessible_origins: "*"    # All origins are accessible by default in Admin API mode - You may specify specific ones here as required
